function.name: DASHBOARD__get_backend_status
function.description: Verifies if the AI backend (Ollama, Kobold, or Cloud) is online and ready.

function.name: DASHBOARD__get_full_dashboard
function.description: Returns a complete report of all hardware resources and AI backend status.

function.name: DASHBOARD__get_gpu_status
function.description: Returns the video card (GPU) status, including VRAM usage and thermal/computational load.

function.name: DASHBOARD__get_system_resources
function.description: Returns a summary of system CPU and RAM usage.

function.name: DOMOTICA__get_home_status
function.description: Provides a summary of the status of smart home devices (e.g., temperature, lights on).

function.name: EXECUTOR__execute_shell
function.description: Executes a shell command in the system terminal and returns the output (max 500 characters).

function.name: FILE_MANAGER__count_items
function.description: Counts the total number of files and folders in a given path, without listing them.

path.description: The path of the directory to inspect.

function.name: FILE_MANAGER__list_files
function.description: SCANS and lists files/folders in a path to return the names to the AI.

path.description: The path of the directory to inspect (e.g., 'desktop' or an absolute path).

function.name: FILE_MANAGER__read_file
function.description: Reads the textual content of a file specified by the path.

path.description: The path of the text file to read.

function.name: HELP__list_capabilities
function.description: Displays the complete list of all tools, modules, and capabilities currently loaded in the system.

function.name: HELP__refresh_registry
function.description: Forces a re-read and update of the central capabilities registry (rescans plugins).

function.name: IMAGE_GEN__generate_image
function.description: Generates an image from a text description using an external AI server.

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image to generate.

function.name: MEDIA__set_mute
function.description: Toggles system mute mode on or off.

function.name: MEDIA__set_volume
function.description: Sets the system volume to a specific level.

level.description: The desired volume level, from 0 to 100.

function.name: MEMORY__read_history
function.description: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.

n.description: The number of previous messages to extract (e.g. '10').

function.name: MEMORY__remember_info
function.description: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.

text.description: The detailed information to remember (e.g. 'The user likes coffee').

function.name: MEMORY__reset_memory
function.description: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire episodic chat history.

function.name: MEMORY__who_am_i
function.description: Ask Zentra to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI (context profile).

function.name: MODELS__get_current_backend
function.description: Returns the AI backend currently in use (e.g., cloud, ollama, kobold).

function.name: MODELS__list_models
function.description: Lists all available models for the currently selected backend.

function.name: MODELS__set_model
function.description: Sets a new active AI model based on the numeric index obtained from list_models.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__list_characters
function.description: Lists all characters available for roleplaying.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__list_scenes
function.description: Lists all scenes available for roleplaying.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__load_character
function.description: Loads a character by name to interpret their role.

name.description: The exact name of the character to load.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__load_scene
function.description: Loads a specific setting or scene for roleplaying.

name.description: The name of the scene to load.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__reset_roleplay
function.description: Complete reset of active characters and scenes.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__unload_character
function.description: Deactivates the current character and returns to the normal personality.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__unload_scene
function.description: Removes the current scene or setting.

function.name: SYSTEM__execute_shell_command
function.description: Executes a shell command (cmd.exe) in the background and returns the output.

command.description: The exact command to pass to the shell.

function.name: SYSTEM__explore_folder
function.description: OPENS a graphical Windows Explorer window for the specified folder.

folder_path.description: The path or alias of the folder (e.g., 'desktop', 'download', 'documents').

function.name: SYSTEM__get_time
function.description: Returns the current local time (HH:MM).

function.name: SYSTEM__open_program
function.description: Starts a local program specified by name.

program_name.description: The name of the program to open (e.g., 'notepad', 'chrome').

function.name: SYSTEM__open_terminal
function.description: Opens a new independent Windows command prompt (CMD) window.

function.name: SYSTEM__read_debug_logs
function.description: Reads the technical debug logs (LiteLLM, Brain processing).

function.name: SYSTEM__read_errors
function.description: Reads specifically the latest errors (crashes, exceptions) recorded by the system.

function.name: SYSTEM__read_logs
function.description: Legge gli ultimi eventi registrati nei file di log generali del sistema.

function.name: SYSTEM__reboot_system
function.description: Reboots the entire Zentra Core system.

function.name: SYSTEM__set_configuration
function.description: Modifies a value within the main configuration file (config.json).

section.description: The root section of the config (e.g., 'llm', 'backend', 'voice').

function.name: WEB__open_url
function.description: Opens a specific website in the default browser.

function.name: WEB__search_web
function.description: Performs an internet search using the default search engine (e.g., Google).

query.description: The terms to search for on the internet.

function.name: WEBCAM__take_snapshot
function.description: Takes a photo using the computer's webcam and saves it to disk.

function.name: WEB_UI__get_panel_url
function.description: Returns the URL of the chat interface.

function.name: WEB_UI__open_browser
function.description: Opens the Zentra web interface in the default browser if not already open.
